title: AWS Weekly Roundup: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, Agent Toolkit for AWS, and more (May 11, 2026)
summary: My most exciting news of last week: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore previewed the first managed payment capabilities enabling AI agents to autonomously access and pay for APIs, MCP servers, web content, and other agents. Built in partnership with Coinbase and Stripe, it removes the undifferentiated heavy lifting of building customized systems for billing, credential management, and […]
author: Channy Yun (윤석찬)

title: Don’t Pay for Beige Prose
summary:
Fed up with lackluster prose from many top AI models, increasing numbers of editors and writers are flocking to Open Source AI.

The post Don’t Pay for Beige Prose appeared first on Robot Writers AI.
author: Joe Dysart

title: OpenClaw vs Hermes vs Claude – competing visions for AI agents
summary: AI agents are evolving into always-on autonomous systems that can remember, learn, and operate continuously across multiple platforms. OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, and Claude are leading this transformation, but each is taking a radically different approach that could define the future of AI automation.
